business.name: Lee's Landscaping
business.tagline: Transforming Wilmington yards into neighborhood showstoppers

hero.headline: Your yard *deserves better* than just okay
hero.subheadline: We turn tired flowerbeds into butterfly magnets and blank spaces into the kind of yard that makes neighbors slow down when they drive by.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: From nasty to neighborhood envy
services_section.subheading: Complete landscape transformations that actually last

services.title: Full Landscape Installation
services.description: Complete yard makeovers — from design to planting to rock work. We'll take your space from blank canvas to best house on the block.

services.title: Flowerbed Design & Planting
services.description: Tired flowerbeds become color-filled butterfly magnets. We source from quality nurseries and plant for year-round appeal.

services.title: Fire Pit & Seating Areas
services.description: Custom outdoor living spaces where you'll actually want to spend time. Professional installation with attention to every detail.

services.title: Mulching & Fertilizing
services.description: Keep your landscape looking fresh with proper mulching and feeding schedules. We handle the maintenance so you enjoy the results.

about.heading: Austin Butler & the Lee's Landscaping team
about.body: We're the crew behind Wilmington's most talked-about yard transformations. From major rock work to delicate flowerbed designs, we handle every project like it's our own backyard. Our team includes Nathan, Steven, and Geronimo — all committed to turning your outdoor vision into reality, even on the hottest Carolina days.

reviews.name: Holly R.
reviews.text: First time working with Lee's and they nailed it. Communication was perfect since this is our second home, and they went above and beyond to get exactly what I wanted.

reviews.name: Jacob C.
reviews.text: Lee's is the real deal! Full landscape installation plus major rock work — my yard went from just okay to best-looking house on the block.

reviews.name: Sarah W.
reviews.text: Austin responded within 24 hours and came out quickly. Professional, hardworking, and did fantastic work on our front flower beds.

reviews.name: Jennifer H.
reviews.text: Austin and his team added a fire pit area and landscaping — polite, hardworking crew even on one of the hottest days of the year.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving the Cape Fear region
service_areas.subheading: Professional landscaping throughout southeastern North Carolina

cta.heading: Ready for the best-looking yard on your block?
cta.body: We respond fast, show up when promised, and deliver results that make neighbors ask for your secret. Let's transform your outdoor space.
